name: ears
description: Read-only knowledge bundle for the Easy Approach to Requirements Syntax (EARS) — a lightweight set of five natural-language patterns (Ubiquitous, State-driven, Event-driven, Optional Feature, Unwanted Behaviour) plus a Complex composite that constrain natural language just enough to make requirements clear, concise, unambiguous, and testable. Activates whenever an agent must author, review, classify, or rewrite a requirement statement.
